030090a0-030090bf : /soc@03000000/watchdog@030090a0
0300b000-0300b3ff : /soc@03000000/pinctrl@0300b000
04020000-04020fff : /soc@03000000/sdmmc@04020000
04021000-04021fff : /soc@03000000/sdmmc@04021000
05000000-050003ff : uart
05000400-050007ff : uart
05000800-05000bff : uart
05000c00-05000fff : uart
05001000-050013ff : uart
05002400-050027ff : /soc@03000000/twi@0x05002400
05002800-05002bff : /soc@03000000/twi@0x05002800
05002c00-05002fff : /soc@03000000/twi@0x05002c00
05010000-05010fff : spi0
05011000-05011fff : spi1
05013000-05013fff : spi3
05091000-05091073 : sunxi-daudio
05092000-05092073 : sunxi-daudio
07000000-070003ff : /soc@03000000/rtc@07000000
07022000-070223ff : /soc@03000000/pinctrl@07022000
40000000-7fffffff : System RAM
  40008000-404c0fff : Kernel code
  404f0000-4058af03 : Kernel data
